meaning: adj.涓嶅紩浜烘敞鎰忕殑,鏃犱环鍊肩殑
examples: Time--nobody knew how much of it--swept by unheeded and unnoted.
I hear some preachers in the west or in Asia, they say the law is unnoted, finished.
But some other areas on our list are benefiting from a hitherto unnoted shift of high-end services to lower-cost and often lower-density regions.
Not surprisingly, Dahlan's statement went almost completely unnoted.
